# Taj Web Studio
> AI-powered web design studio for small businesses. Strategy-first websites, built fast,
> designed to be found on Google and cited by AI answer engines (SEO, AEO, GEO).
> Specialty: healthcare organizations (hospice, home care, clinics). Southern California & remote.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://tajwebstudio.com/): what we do and who we help
- [Healthcare websites](https://tajwebstudio.com/healthcare.html): compliance-aware sites for hospice, home care & clinics
- [Pricing](https://tajwebstudio.com/pricing.html): builds $1,500–$12,000+ (most clients $4,000–$6,000); monthly visibility plans $149–$1,500+
- [Answers](https://tajwebstudio.com/answers.html): website costs, AI search visibility, SEO vs AEO vs GEO explained
- [Book a free discovery call](https://tajwebstudio.com/book.html): free 30-minute consultation

## Contact
